case.title: CITY OF NEW ORLEANS v. BUSH

opinion.h1: CITY OF NEW ORLEANS v. BUSH, 366 U.S. 212 (1961)
opinion.h4: CITY OF NEW ORLEANS v. BUSH ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF LOUISIANA. No. 812. Decided May 8, 1961.
opinion.p: Alvin J. Liska and Gerald P. Fedoroff for appellant.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
366 U.S. 212 BOLOGNA v. MORRISSEY. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSISSIPPI. No. 829. Decided May 8, 1961.
Frank E. Everett, Jr. for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
